evals.prompt: Generate 8 standard interview questions for the top candidate for our CTO position.
evals.expected_output: Finds context and candidate, generates 8 interview questions at standard pressure, presents each with rationale.

assertions.name: generates_questions
assertions.description: Calls atlas_generate_interview with num_questions=8 and pressure_level=standard

assertions.name: shows_rationale
assertions.description: Each question includes rationale for why it matters
